title: Auro: Create and Conquer
description: The official modpack for Auro: Create and Conquer. Build Nations, Wage Wars, and Create History while immersing yourself in a Create focused modpack.
body:
Welcome to Auro: Create and Conquer, where you'll forge nations, wage epic wars, and create your own history. With mods like Create, Alex's Mobs, and Farmers Delight, this modpack offers a unique sandbox experience. Immerse yourself in rich roleplay, build civilizations, and dominate the realm, all while living the motto: 'Build Nations, Wage Wars, Create History.' Your journey of creation and conquest begins here.

Here are some notable mods within this pack:

- Alex's mobs
- Farmers Delight
- Create
    - Create: Extended Cogwheels
    - Create: Stuff and Additions
    - Create: Steam and Rails
    - Create: Confectionary
    - Create: Enchantment Industries
- Chipped
- Corpse
- Framed Blocks
- Macaw's Bridges, Trapdoors and Doors
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- JEI
- Simple Voice Chat
- Storage Drawers

*All mods are the property of their respective owners, and we extend our thanks to these talented creators. Without their work, none of this would be possible!*

*I would also like to give credit to MrBeardstone, who was the initial inspiration for this modpack!*

~~This is the official modpack required to play on the Auro: Create and Conquer server. You must be a member of our [Discord](https://discord.gg/ZcwhM4kqaT) to join the server.~~

Additional attribution to mods and their authors used in this pack:
[black powder guns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/daniinatorul)
[Create: Recycle Everything](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything)
[Flintlock 3D Models](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/flintl0cks)
[Macaw's Trapdoors (by sketch_macaw)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-trapdoors)
[Macaw's Fences and Walls (by sketch_macaw)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls)
[Macaw's Doors (by sketch_macaw)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors)
[Macaw's Bridges (by sketch_macaw)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges)
[Vanilla Tweaks (VanillaTweaks and hardcore-vanilla-tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
